Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 173 

DESCRIPTION: The code used to identify the present on admission (POA) indicator code associated with the diagnosis 
codes (DGNSCD1–DGNSCD25).
